summary: A moving vocal showcase on "Days Between" with an emotionally resonant recording despite unknown source details.
review: The reviewer praises Jerry Garcia’s heartfelt vocal delivery on the rare track “Days Between,” describing it as sincere, painful and beautiful. No technical flaws are mentioned, suggesting the recording is at least clear enough to appreciate the performance.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one detailed five‑star review; strong praise for the musical performance but no concrete info on recording quality, so rating leans heavily on show quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer does not comment on sound clarity or mix, implying the audio is acceptable for enjoying the vocals.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Voice described as sincere, painful and gentle; emotionally powerful performance.
